name: IdsEdwEvtStaffTypDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SRC AS ( SELECT EVT_STAFF_TYP.EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK, EVT_STAFF_TYP.EVT_STAFF_TYP_ID, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, EVT_STAFF_TYP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, EVT_STAFF_TYP.EVT_STAFF_TYP_DESC, EVT_STAFF_TYP.LAST_UPDT_DTM, EVT_STAFF_TYP.LAST_UPDT_USER_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.EVT_STAFF_TYP EVT_STAFF_TYP LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON EVT_STAFF_TYP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE EVT_STAFF_TYP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsRunCycle}), TRANS AS ( SELECT EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK, EVT_STAFF_TYP_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_DTM AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, EVT_STAFF_TYP_DESC, LAST_UPDT_USER_ID AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_LAST_UPDT_USR_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM SRC WHERE EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK <> 0 AND EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK <> 1 ), CONSTANTS AS ( SELECT 0 AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK, 'UNK' AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_ID, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAST('1753-01-01 00:00:00.000' AS DATETIME) AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, '' AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_DESC, 'UNK' AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_LAST_UPDT_USR_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK UNION ALL SELECT 1, 'NA', 'NA', '1753-01-01', '1753-01-01', CAST('1753-01-01 00:00:00.000' AS DATETIME), '', 'NA', 100, 100, 100 ) SELECT * FROM TRANS UNION ALL SELECT * FROM CONSTANTS
